---
title: "teacup preamble fixture"
format: html
filters:
  - teacup
teacup:
  cache: _fixture-cache
  preamble: \usetikzlibrary{arrows}
---

The `-triangle 60` arrow tip only exists in the `arrows` library, so this
render fails unless the metadata preamble reaches the LaTeX compile.
(Regression: raw TeX in metadata was silently dropped by stringify.)

```{.tikz}
\draw[-triangle 60, accent] (0,0) -- (1,0);
```
